list.name: Changes
list.comment: chore(ui): rename Income table column from "Payment Due" to "Deposit Due" - Change index.html to use Spend Wisely! instead of 'Spend Well!'

task.summary:
`feat(transactions): make monthly XLSX imports authoritative and improve UI readability
Treat spreadsheet import as sole source of truth for month: delete all transactions for imported YYYY-MM before inserting new rows keep single-month import guardrail and baseline replacement semantics Add repository/service path for deleting all transactions by month key(s) Add regression test ensuring manual entries in import month are removed on re-import Improve header title contrast by removing hardcoded text color and using theme-adaptive palette Keep import/result reporting and tests green (19 passed)`

feat: add Sub Payments workflow with idempotent SubTracker posting
- add Dashboard "Sub Payments" button and non-modal Sub Payments dialog - load current month subscription expenses and support manual sub mapping - add description->vendor auto-suggest for initial subscription selection - add SubTracker payment ingest contract and idempotent upsert/update posting - add local sub_payment_mappings persistence for mapping/post status tracking - persist edited payment amount overrides and reuse on subsequent processing - support correction reposts without creating duplicate SubTracker payments - switch transaction and sub-payment candidate ordering to date ASC - add/extend migration coverage and integration tests for new payment flow

feat(Bills) Refine bills tab with totals, month sync, and PDF reporting
- add Bills Totals and Category Sub-Totals panels - keep bill subtotals and grand total in sync with bill list updates - convert bills report export from CSV to PDF with summary sections - fix Bills month selection so months without transactions remain accessible - sync Dashboard month selection to Bills month view - improve SubTracker recurring bill refresh/display behavior - clean up Bills tab layout and controls

feat: add Balance Checking tab with running balance and cleared-state reconciliation
- add new Balance Checking tab with month selector and beginning balance input - persist per-month checking beginning balances - add checking ledger query: current month + prior uncleared checking transactions - compute/display running balance using signed transaction amounts - add Cleared column with click-to-toggle persistence to transactions.is_cleared - include transaction Note column in balance-checking ledger - update transactions data/query plumbing for is_cleared and payment_type in reconciliation view - add schema/migration v12 for checking_month_settings - adjust balance-checking column sizing and transactions note field width - update tests (migration/core/ui smoke)

feat(settings+import): add categories export path setting, enforce non-creating import category mapping, and duplicate-category merge workflow
Optional fuller body:
add Categories Export Location field + Browse in Settings persist ui.last_categories_export_dir on Settings Save validate categories export directory path when provided use settings/form export path as default start directory for category export update export path field after successful category CSV export log changes to categories export path in main settings save flow change XLSX import category handling to map only to existing categories (case-insensitive) and leave unmatched categories blank harden category repository lookup/upsert for case-insensitive matching add safe duplicate category merge path in Settings delete flow (repoint FK references, merge budget rows/notes, delete duplicate) add/extend tests for category merge, case-insensitive mapping, and non-creating import behavior
chore(ui): rename Income table column from "Payment Due" to "Deposit Due" - Change index.html to use Spend Wisely! instead of 'Spend Well!'

MESSAGE.value:
`feat(transactions): make monthly XLSX imports authoritative and improve UI readability
Treat spreadsheet import as sole source of truth for month: delete all transactions for imported YYYY-MM before inserting new rows keep single-month import guardrail and baseline replacement semantics Add repository/service path for deleting all transactions by month key(s) Add regression test ensuring manual entries in import month are removed on re-import Improve header title contrast by removing hardcoded text color and using theme-adaptive palette Keep import/result reporting and tests green (19 passed)`

feat: add Sub Payments workflow with idempotent SubTracker posting
- add Dashboard "Sub Payments" button and non-modal Sub Payments dialog - load current month subscription expenses and support manual sub mapping - add description->vendor auto-suggest for initial subscription selection - add SubTracker payment ingest contract and idempotent upsert/update posting - add local sub_payment_mappings persistence for mapping/post status tracking - persist edited payment amount overrides and reuse on subsequent processing - support correction reposts without creating duplicate SubTracker payments - switch transaction and sub-payment candidate ordering to date ASC - add/extend migration coverage and integration tests for new payment flow

feat(Bills) Refine bills tab with totals, month sync, and PDF reporting
- add Bills Totals and Category Sub-Totals panels - keep bill subtotals and grand total in sync with bill list updates - convert bills report export from CSV to PDF with summary sections - fix Bills month selection so months without transactions remain accessible - sync Dashboard month selection to Bills month view - improve SubTracker recurring bill refresh/display behavior - clean up Bills tab layout and controls

feat: add Balance Checking tab with running balance and cleared-state reconciliation
- add new Balance Checking tab with month selector and beginning balance input - persist per-month checking beginning balances - add checking ledger query: current month + prior uncleared checking transactions - compute/display running balance using signed transaction amounts - add Cleared column with click-to-toggle persistence to transactions.is_cleared - include transaction Note column in balance-checking ledger - update transactions data/query plumbing for is_cleared and payment_type in reconciliation view - add schema/migration v12 for checking_month_settings - adjust balance-checking column sizing and transactions note field width - update tests (migration/core/ui smoke)

feat(settings+import): add categories export path setting, enforce non-creating import category mapping, and duplicate-category merge workflow
Optional fuller body:
add Categories Export Location field + Browse in Settings persist ui.last_categories_export_dir on Settings Save validate categories export directory path when provided use settings/form export path as default start directory for category export update export path field after successful category CSV export log changes to categories export path in main settings save flow change XLSX import category handling to map only to existing categories (case-insensitive) and leave unmatched categories blank harden category repository lookup/upsert for case-insensitive matching add safe duplicate category merge path in Settings delete flow (repoint FK references, merge budget rows/notes, delete duplicate) add/extend tests for category merge, case-insensitive mapping, and non-creating import behavior
chore(ui): rename Income table column from "Payment Due" to "Deposit Due" - Change index.html to use Spend Wisely! instead of 'Spend Well!'

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: chore(ui): rename Income table column from "Payment Due" to "Deposit Due" - Change index.html to use Spend Wisely! instead of 'Spend Well!'
